description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a bald head and a prominent full beard. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve crewneck shirt and straight-cut pants, paired with classic lace-up sneakers. The figure's arms are slightly bent and extended outward, with fingers splayed, giving a relaxed but alert posture. The facial features are simplified, with a defined nose, eyebrows, and beard, and the body proportions are slightly exaggerated for a cartoon-like appearance. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes have visible laces and soles. The overall look suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult male pedestrian with a bald head, full beard, casual long-sleeve shirt, pants, and lace-up sneakers, posed with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, beard, chest, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, beard, and the side of the body and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, beard, and the right side of the body and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
